summary: Frontend testing of bug fixes and enhancements for LEAMSS Portal. All 8 features verified working: Layout fix (sidebar no overlap), Documents table (N/A instead of Invalid Date), CreateTicket restrictToClient, Also notify Admin option, Partner Commission filters, CSV download, approved sales only, and notification navigation.

case_manager_dashboard_layout.sidebar_no_overlap: PASSED - Sidebar width: 256px, Main content starts at x=256px

case_manager_raise_ticket_in_case.restrict_to_client: PASSED - Shows 'This ticket will be sent to: Client User'
case_manager_raise_ticket_in_case.create_ticket_button: PASSED - Button visible in case view header

notification_navigation.click_navigates_to_section: PASSED - Ticket notification navigates to Support section

features_verified: Case Manager Dashboard layout - sidebar does NOT overlap content (sidebar width: 256px, main starts at x=256) - VERIFIED
Case Manager All Documents - no 'Invalid Date' errors, shows 'N/A' for null dates - VERIFIED
Case Manager Raise Ticket when in case - shows 'This ticket will be sent to: [Client Name]' - VERIFIED
Case Manager Raise Ticket - 'Also notify Admin (escalate issue)' option available - VERIFIED
Partner Commission section - period filter (All Time, This Week, This Month, This Quarter, This Year) - VERIFIED
Partner Commission - Download CSV button works (downloaded my_commissions_2026-01-17.csv) - VERIFIED
Partner Commission - shows only approved sales (6 approved sales displayed) - VERIFIED
Notification click navigates to correct section (ticket notification -> Support section) - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: CaseManagerDashboard.jsx: formatDate helper function correctly handles null/invalid dates by returning 'N/A'
CaseManagerDashboard.jsx: Sidebar uses 'fixed h-screen' with main content using 'ml-64' to prevent overlap
CreateTicket.jsx: restrictToClient prop correctly limits ticket recipients to specific client
CreateTicket.jsx: 'Also notify Admin' checkbox available for escalation
PartnerDashboard.jsx: Commission section has period filter with all 5 options (All Time, Weekly, Monthly, Quarterly, Yearly)
PartnerDashboard.jsx: downloadMyCommissions function generates CSV with proper formatting
PartnerDashboard.jsx: filteredCommissions only shows approved sales
NotificationBell.jsx: handleNotificationClick navigates to correct section based on notification type
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes and enhancements verified working. Layout fix uses fixed sidebar with ml-64 margin on main content. formatDate helper returns 'N/A' for null/invalid dates. CreateTicket supports restrictToClient prop. Partner Commission has period filters and CSV export. Notification navigation works correctly.
